buildCommand: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/compiler/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/runtime/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/content/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/canopy/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && cd marketing && node ../packages/cli/bin/wald.js build
